---
title: "spatial-analysis-pkmapr"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{spatial-analysis-pkmapr}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```

```{r setup}
library(pkmapr)
```
